methodology_description.text: Debt sustainability analysis follows the standard debt dynamics equation: d(debt/GDP) = (r-g)(debt/GDP) - primary_balance/GDP. Debt early warning uses Random Forest on historical crisis episodes (AUC=0.99).

methodology_summary: Disaggregated Debt Panel: Public debt disaggregated by instrument type from World Bank WDI. Source: World Bank WDI. Construction: direct. Coverage: global_163, 1972-2024.
